plugins.description: Use a curated set of standalone review, governance, and CI-monitoring agents plus direct-use skills (PR/review/goal handoffs, premise investigations, doc-to-html report pages, team-scale QA sweeps, strict code-quality reviews, PR comment triage), without onboarding.
